subcodes.first_line: O thou confident leaf! Though souls be many, those possessing true confidence are few and rare, for assurance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الورقه المطمئنه نفوس بسیارند ولی نفس مطمئنه قلیل و کمیاب زیرا اطمینان
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of faith; certitude, @thankfulness; gratitude, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
